svg.text: The Minimal Iterator Relation R* — Ordered Pair Structure
Blue circle = P-component of pair · Red circle = W-component · g advances in W
P × W (Cartesian product — ordered pairs (n, x))
F(1) = a [blue arc lands on a in row 1]
F(S(n)) = g(F(n)) [red arc + g arrow = next row]
Anatomy of an ordered pair in R*
R* = { all such pairs forced by the recursion }
